## TRM1.4. Air traffic control pre-departure delay (PI#2)

The delay in 2025 was equal to 0.07 min/dep, very close to the value of 2024 -- last year of RP3 -- of 0.08 min/dep.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATC pre-departure delay across Member States and for which enough data is available in 2025 was 0.74 min/dep.
